settings.legalHostingProvider: Vercel Inc. — San Francisco, CA, USA
settings.legalIntellectualText: All content on the GreenEcoGenius platform (texts, graphics, software, databases, trademarks) is protected by intellectual property law. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written authorization from GreenEcoGenius OÜ.
settings.legalApplicableLawText: These legal notices are governed by Estonian law. Any dispute shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Tallinn, Estonia.
settings.legalCompanyType: Limited liability company (OÜ) under Estonian law
settings.legalActivityDesc: Business and other management consultancy activities
settings.legalRegistryDesc: Registered in the Estonian Commercial Register (e-Business Register)
settings.legalIntellectualDesc: All content of this application (texts, images, logos, icons, software) is the exclusive property of GreenEcoGenius OÜ or its partners and is protected by intellectual property laws. Any reproduction, representation, or distribution, in whole or in part, of the content of this application is prohibited without prior written authorization.
settings.privacyControllerDesc: GreenEcoGenius OÜ, a company registered in Estonia under number 16917315, with its registered office at Tornimäe tn 5, 10145 Tallinn, Estonia, is the data controller for your personal data.
settings.privacyDataIntro: We collect the following data as part of the use of the application:
settings.privacyDataId: Identification data: name, surname, email address
settings.privacyDataCompany: Company data: company name, registration number, business sector
settings.privacyDataTransactions: Transaction data: marketplace listings, traceability certificates
settings.privacyDataEnvironment: Environmental data: carbon footprints, ESG indicators
settings.privacyDataTechnical: Technical data: connection logs, device type
settings.privacyPurposeIntro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
settings.privacyPurposeMarketplace: Operation of the recyclable materials marketplace
settings.privacyPurposeCarbon: Calculation and monitoring of your carbon footprint
settings.privacyPurposeEsg: Generation of ESG and compliance reports
settings.privacyPurposeGenius: Operation of the Genius AI assistant
settings.privacyLegalBasisDesc: The processing of your data is based on the performance of the contract (use of the service), your consent (notifications, marketing), and our legitimate interests (security, service improvement).
settings.privacyRetentionDesc: Your data is retained for the duration of your subscription and up to 3 years after its end for legal obligations. Billing data is retained for 10 years in accordance with accounting obligations.
settings.privacySubVercel: Vercel — Application hosting (USA, standard contractual clauses)
settings.privacySubOpenai: OpenAI — Genius AI Assistant (USA, DPA signed)
settings.privacyRightsIntro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
settings.privacyRightAccess: Right of access to your personal data
settings.privacyRightRectification: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
settings.privacyRightErasure: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')
settings.privacyRightsContact: To exercise these rights, contact us at: contact@greenecogenius.tech
settings.privacyCookiesDesc: The mobile application does not use third-party cookies. Only strictly necessary technical cookies are used for the operation of the service (authentication session).
settings.termsArt1Desc: These Terms of Service (ToS) govern the use of the GreenEcoGenius application, published by GreenEcoGenius OÜ. The application is a circular economy platform comprising: a recyclable materials marketplace, a blockchain traceability system, a carbon footprint calculator, ESG/CSRD reporting, and an AI assistant.
settings.termsArt2Desc: Use of the application implies full and complete acceptance of these ToS. The Publisher reserves the right to modify the ToS at any time. Users will be informed of any changes by notification within the application.
settings.termsArt3Desc: Access to the services requires the creation of a user account. The user agrees to provide accurate information and to maintain the confidentiality of their credentials. Any activity carried out from their account is their responsibility.
settings.termsArt4Desc: The application offers three subscription plans: Essential (€149/month), Advanced (€449/month), and Enterprise (custom). Payments are managed by Stripe. Subscriptions are automatically renewed each month unless cancelled by the user before the renewal date.
settings.termsArt4Trial: A 14-day free trial is offered for the Essential and Advanced plans. No charges are made during the trial period.
settings.termsArt5Desc: The marketplace allows users to post buy and sell listings for recyclable materials. The Publisher acts as a technical intermediary and does not participate in transactions between users. Each user is responsible for the accuracy of the information published.
settings.termsArt6Desc: Traceability certificates are recorded on the Polygon blockchain. Once recorded, data cannot be modified or deleted. The Publisher does not guarantee the permanent availability of the blockchain network.
settings.termsArt7Desc: The Genius AI assistant provides analyses and recommendations for informational purposes only. This information does not constitute professional legal, financial, or environmental advice. The user remains solely responsible for decisions made based on these recommendations.
settings.termsArt8Desc: All elements of the application (code, design, texts, logos, algorithms) are protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is strictly prohibited.
settings.termsArt9Desc: The Publisher strives to ensure the availability and reliability of the application but cannot guarantee uninterrupted operation. The Publisher shall not be held liable for indirect damages resulting from the use of the application.
settings.termsArt10Desc: The user may terminate their account at any time from the application settings. The Publisher reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation of these ToS.
settings.termsArt11Desc: These ToS are governed by Estonian law. In the event of a dispute, the parties agree to seek an amicable solution. Failing that, the courts of Tallinn (Estonia) shall have jurisdiction.

genius.title: Genius
genius.subtitle: Your AI assistant for ESG
genius.intro: Hi. I'm Genius, your AI assistant for circular economy, ESG and CSRD compliance.
genius.introTip: Ask me anything, I'll route you to the right specialist automatically.
genius.suggestion1: How can I reduce my carbon footprint?
genius.suggestion2: What should a CSRD report include?
genius.suggestion3: How do I list a material on the Comptoir?
genius.suggestion4: Which CSR standards apply to my company?
genius.errorGeneric: Genius couldn't reply. Please try again in a moment.
genius.errorAuth: Session expired. Please sign in again.

carbon.title: Carbon
carbon.subtitle: Track your CO₂ footprint
carbon.emptyRecordsHint: Your Marketplace transactions will appear here once recorded.
carbon.scope1Desc: Combustion (gas, fuel) and other direct emissions
carbon.esgFootnote: Estimates based on ADEME 2024 factors. Official calculation available on the web app.
carbon.emptyEsgHint: Enter your ESG data on the web app to generate your annual report.

more.title: More
more.subtitle: Additional modules
more.traceabilityDescFull: Blockchain certificates, QR scan and verification

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Available recycled materials
marketplace.readOnlyFootnote: Read-only view. To purchase, use the web app.
marketplace.photoHint: Up to 5 photos. Take a photo or choose from your gallery.
marketplace.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your material, its condition, its origin...

traceability.title: Traceability
traceability.subtitle: Blockchain verification of your lots
traceability.emptyCertsHint: Your traceability certificates will appear here once your Marketplace transactions are completed.
traceability.footnote: All certificates are anchored on Polygon mainnet and publicly verifiable.
traceability.scanHint: Point your camera at the certificate QR code
traceability.scanUnsupportedHint: QR scanning only works on a physical iPhone, not in the simulator or browser.
traceability.permDeniedHint: Enable camera for this app in iOS Settings to use the scanner.
traceability.detailFootnote: Data anchored on Polygon mainnet, immutable and publicly verifiable.
traceability.certNotFoundHint: The scanned QR code does not match any active certificate on the platform.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.commissionGridDesc: Degressive commission on each transaction. Traceability and carbon calculation included.
wallet.launchOffer: Launch offer: 5% flat for 6 months for the first 50 companies
wallet.blockchainDesc: Each transaction is verified and recorded on the Polygon blockchain via the Alchemy API. The transaction hash ensures complete traceability of the lot, from sale to reception.
wallet.stripeNotConnectedDesc: Connect your Stripe account to receive payments.
wallet.stripePendingDesc: Your account is being verified by Stripe.
wallet.contractsDesc: Each transaction generates a contract electronically signed by both parties. Signature is mandatory before funds are released.

rse.subtitle: Diagnostic and eligibility
rse.diagnosticCtaDesc: Get your personalized score and a detailed action plan.
